description_long: This is a compact MIDI controller keyboard featuring 25 piano-style keys, eight rotary knobs, and a set of square velocity-sensitive drum pads above the keys. The body is primarily matte black plastic with a slightly textured finish, while the keys are glossy white and black. The top panel includes several control buttons, sliders, and a few indicator LEDs, suggesting advanced functionality for music production. The left side of the panel has a few additional buttons and a small joystick or touchpad for pitch or modulation control. The overall design is sleek and portable, suitable for desktop or mobile music setups. The keyboard appears to be in a used condition, with some visible wear and discoloration on the keys.
description: A compact, black MIDI controller keyboard with 25 keys, drum pads, rotary knobs, and control buttons, showing signs of use and wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full set of piano keys, drum pads, rotary knobs, and control buttons clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the keyboard and the side profile of the keys and controls.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the row of rotary knobs and the back edges of the keys and pads.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the length of the keys and the side profile of the control surface.
